series_metadata.series_description: Files contain active and inactive case documents, including pertinent supportive information (complaints and hearing records), and may include final disposition and informal complaint.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 10 years then destroy when no longer of administrative or legal value to the department. ; Paper: Retain 60 days after hardcopy is prepped, scanned (imaged), indexed and quality control is complete then destroyed., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
